name: vscode-candor
description: Syntax highlighting (layer 1) and a diagnostics-only LSP client (layer 2) for the Candor language. No hover/completion/go-to-def: those are deferred to the real Candor toolchain (P16).

candor.lsp.enabled.description: Start the Candor diagnostics LSP server on activation.

candor.lsp.serverPath.description: Absolute path to the candor-lsp binary. When empty, the extension looks for tools/candor-lsp/target/release/candor-lsp next to the extension, then falls back to 'candor-lsp' on PATH.

candor.lsp.trace.server.description: Trace the JSON-RPC traffic between VS Code and candor-lsp.
